old_claim.note: Mortar & Pestle provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: No mortar-and-pestle dependency remains because the molecular study describes hot-water collagen extraction and provides no crushing or pounding step.

source_shape.source_locator: Introduction describes immersion of skin, bone, and connective tissue in hot water; Methods analyze flakes from beneath the bark decoration.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The supported production mechanism is thermal collagen extraction, with no documented grinding-tool operation.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Adding a mortar would invent an equipment requirement absent from both the biochemical process description and the sampled bow context.

ontology_before: A generic pounding tool was assumed to enable hide glue without process or artifact evidence.
ontology_after: The Zurich glue retains only its directly supported livestock feedstock and thermal extraction dependencies.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: hide_glue_production no longer directly depends on mortar_and_pestle.
would_reject_if: The Zurich production sequence were documented to require pulverizing collagen material with a mortar and pestle before extraction.
short_reason: The documented hide-glue process uses hot water, not a mortar-and-pestle step.
